{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220192771E123CB5808083B9ADC"}"},"total":381},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596316030806983486","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体评分：⭐⭐⭐⭐ 半

评价：伟大，无需多言

适合看惯了无脑爽，并且想看享受平静生活的，俗话说的好，平平淡淡才是真，古人诚不欺我也

综漫文，但是却把群像写的不错，每位原著人物的出现都没有ooc，光是这一点就值7分了，爽点，泪点，却也不少，并且都恰到时机的出现了

当然，最核心的还是在于一个氛围，一种感觉，看了这本小说，就如同夏日里的一缕清风，在这个躁动不安的时代给你带来一种平淡生活的美好体验"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768657534,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N25tOtinEaQ/oRqGRaRD/lY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bdb0e18c3ec54a038abb5410a642af7c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707535&x-signature=N4twZahBJiR6CQ899XXnxa%2BoaT8%3D","user_id":"329501318854488","user_name":"超级闲鱼佬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"329501318854488","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）
“饼藏哆啦，快用你无敌的大脑想想办法啊！”
“我真的只会一点点啊！”大路饼藏欲哭无泪。
……
我叫大路饼藏，我的梦想是作为一名真正的普通人，享受平静的校园与日常生活。
但为什么我身边总是这些奇奇怪怪的人啊！
“说到底，还不是因为你解开了圣剑的封印吗？！”
“谁知道里面是一条龙啊！”
“……那不是完蛋了吗！”
“快召唤露科亚来救我们呀！！”
露易兹干脆大喊道。
“可恶，我已经召唤过了，但是露科亚好像被我传送到魔界了！”
“你这个不靠谱的笨蛋！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ff94af02f63e38b00c68859a6be4bf9a","author":"爱死比尔","author_id":"","book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_name":"综漫：努力让不平凡生活变得幸福","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8f0e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575389971922567704","read_count":"15275","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"510678"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"231","tags":"动漫衍生,重生,多女主,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/81df008faa5394b0afdefe1f7082bc40~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365967&x-signature=lShMj6ViKtQbmcCMBUs7jiJ1AaQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4218148318357607","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"170"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220192771E123CB5808083B9ADC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dur 这种感觉只在猫《在综漫的日常生活》，以及文豪那本书里见过。
带着淡淡的温馨气息和小溪流淌的味道，作者是下了功夫的，字里行间都能感觉到。
如果期待的话，请点进来看一看吧，不会让你失望的，这是一部日常的佳作。
愿你我都能过上梦寐以求的平凡幸福的生活。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764993429,"group_id":"7575165854497639486","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱赞美世界，秋赞美春天，那边有棵小树在赞美落叶，我赞美一切","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4RYTDNOgu/D858wn0qQqnvsfkTJNrJ2AbaEQoGmbrKH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68f04ae74976438cb24e5a97a8d6dda4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704940&x-signature=84IYF2Y3MbquFlEHej7YUX0BvzE%3D","user_id":"2375398104238579","user_name":"永恒遥远的蓝色天际线"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2375398104238579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575165854497639486","book_info":{"abstract":"（目前融合的世界有夏洛特、龙女仆、零之使魔、玉子市场、声之形，夏目友人帐、入间同学入魔了，后续会根据读者老爷的要求加新世界进去。）
